name: Sportmonks Football and Cricket Data API
what_it_does: Sportmonks developer-friendly football (soccer) and cricket data REST API for developers, fantasy sports platforms, betting applications, and sports analytics to access live scores, fixtures, standings, player statistics, lineups, odds, and historical data across 1,700+ football leagues and competitions worldwide, with GraphQL and REST access, comprehensive documentation, and affordable pricing for developer projects. Enables AI agents to manage live match event data for football application automation, handle fixture and schedule data for sports calendar automation, access team and player statistics for sports analytics automation, retrieve league standings and table for sports results automation, manage odds data for sports betting automation, handle lineups and formations for tactical analysis automation, access transfer data for player market automation, retrieve historical match data for sports research automation, manage competition filtering for multi-league coverage automation, and integrate Sportmonks with sports apps, fantasy platforms, betting tools, and analytics systems for end-to-end football and cricket data automation.
use_cases: Displaying live football scores for sports application automation agents
Accessing player statistics for fantasy football automation agents
Retrieving betting odds for sports prediction automation agents
Building league standings tables for football app automation agents
not_for: Official premium data rights for broadcast (use Stats Perform or Sportradar for official media rights)
American sports (NBA, NFL, MLB) — Sportmonks focuses on football/soccer and cricket
Real-time computer vision tracking data (use Stats Perform for tracking data)
best_when: A developer, fantasy sports platform, or sports analytics application wanting AI agents to automate football and cricket data access for live scores, statistics, and odds through Sportmonks' affordable and developer-friendly API with comprehensive 1,700+ league coverage.
avoid_when: DATA SUBSCRIPTION INCLUDES/EXCLUDES SPECIFIC LEAGUES: Sportmonks plans include different league coverage; automated data access for specific leagues must verify inclusion in subscription plan; automated assumption of all 1,700 leagues in basic plan creates league_not_in_subscription. INCLUDE PARAMETER REQUIRED FOR RELATED DATA: Sportmonks API uses ?include=parameter to expand related data (team statistics, players, odds); automated query without include creates minimal response; automated assumption of full data in base response creates missing related data. ODDS DATA IS SEPARATE SUBSCRIPTION: Sportmonks odds data is a separate add-on beyond base football data; automated betting application must subscribe to odds addon; automated odds access without addon creates odds_subscription_required. LIVE DATA HAS DELAYS WITHOUT PREMIUM PLAN: Sportmonks live scores may have 2-5 minute delays on lower plans; automated real-time use case must subscribe to live data plan; automated non-premium live data creates consumer-facing lag for live sports.

auth.notes: Sportmonks uses API token for authentication. REST and GraphQL API with JSON. Amsterdam, Netherlands HQ. Founded 2015 by Jord Knapen. Bootstrapped. Products: Football data (1,700+ leagues), cricket data, odds API, GraphQL. SDKs: PHP, Node.js, Python. GDPR. Developer-friendly pricing from €9/month. Competes with Sportradar and API-Football for developer football data market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 3 leagues, limited calls; paid plans from €9/month
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter: €9/month; Growth: €29/month; Pro: €99/month; Enterprise: custom; odds addon separate
pricing.notes: Amsterdam NL. Bootstrapped. Monthly subscription from €9. GDPR. Developer-friendly pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token per plan; requests per minute vary by plan; no webhooks (polling only)

known_agent_gotchas: ?INCLUDE= PARAMETER IS REQUIRED FOR RELATED DATA: Sportmonks base responses return minimal data; automated query must specify ?include=statistics,players,odds etc.; automated base query without include creates missing related data requiring N+1 follow-up calls

LEAGUE COVERAGE IS PLAN-DEPENDENT: Sportmonks plans cover different leagues (3 on free, more on paid); automated data access must check if target league is in subscription; automated query for unlicensed league creates 403 league_not_in_plan error

ODDS ADDON IS SEPARATE FROM CORE DATA: Sportmonks odds require separate subscription addon; automated betting application must verify odds subscription; automated odds query without addon creates 403 odds_addon_required

LIVE DATA DELAY ON LOWER PLANS: Sportmonks live scores may be delayed (up to 5 minutes) on starter plans vs real-time on premium; automated real-time display must use premium live plan; automated live-display on starter plan creates stale scores visible to users

GRAPHQL AND REST HAVE DIFFERENT DATA MODELS: Sportmonks GraphQL has slightly different field names from REST; automated integration using both must map field differences; automated assuming same field names across GraphQL and REST creates wrong field reference
agent_readiness.security_notes: Sports data. GDPR. API token. EU. Sports statistics and match data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Sports data. GDPR. API token. EU. Sports statistics and match data.
